lesson.menu_desc: Clothes Vocabulary and Adjective Order -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- What Are You Wearing? -- Clothes Vocabulary and Adjective Order
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 12 -- What Are You Wearing?

listenings.text: Today I am wearing my favorite clothes. I have a blue shirt and black pants. On my feet, I am wearing white shoes. It is a little cold this morning, so I also wear a green jacket. I do not wear a hat today. I like my clothes because they are simple and comfortable. For work, I always wear a nice shirt and dark pants. For the weekend, I wear a red dress and brown shoes. Clothes are important for me, but comfort is more important.

Welcome to our clothes store. Today we have many new clothes for you. We have blue shirts and white shirts for work. We have red dresses and black dresses for parties. For your feet, we have brown shoes and white shoes. We also have warm jackets in green, blue, and gray. And we have nice hats for sunny days. Come in and find your favorite clothes today. Everything is new and the prices are very good.

extra_audio.text: First, I put on a white shirt. Then I put on my blue pants. Next, I put on my black shoes. After that, I take my green jacket. Finally, I put on my favorite hat.
